g.text: Collect repair materials and install them at the Crash Site to fix your ship.
Keep food and water above 0% or you die. Use
— Use drone to discover nearby locations
<item> — Pick up an item at current location
<creature> — Talk to a creature here (LLM dialogue)
<item> to <creature> — Give an item to build trust
— Trade items with a Merchant creature
— Ask a creature to travel with you
<component> — Install a drone upgrade from inventory
<item> — Examine an item to see what it's used for
— Ship bays menu (storage, kitchen, charging, medical, repair)
— Rest for 1 hour to recover food/water
